[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T23:42 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
The user is the Deacon starting up. I need to follow the startup protocol:

1. Run `gt deacon heartbeat` 
2. Check `gt hook`
3. If hook has work → execute it
4. If hook empty → create patrol wisp and execute

The startup context already says a patrol wisp was created and hooked: `skogtown-wisp-c84ju`. Let me follow the protocol.

Let me start by running the heartbeat and checking the hook.

content.content:
○ skogtown-mol-duh [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · OPEN]
Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-23 · Updated: 2026-02-23

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ skogtown-mol-297: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-mol-6vb: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-mol-l9j: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-mol-mdl: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
